record.field: Email notification sent when a new Primary Sale Order is submitted

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #333333; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; background-color: #ffffff;
div.p: Primary Sale Order SO001 for customer Customer Name has been submitted and is awaiting confirmation.

div.style: margin: 20px 0; padding: 15px; background-color: #f9fafb; border-radius: 6px; border-left: 4px solid #7c7bad;

a.style: background-color: #7c7bad; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; font-weight: bold; display: inline-block;

hr.style: border: none; border-top: 1px solid #eeeeee; margin-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px;

div.p: Automated Notification from Secondary Sales Odoo Backend.

record.field: Primary Sale Order: Delivery Validation Required
Email notification sent to Supply Chain Coordinators when delivery validation is required

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #333333; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; background-color: #ffffff;
div.p: Order SO001 is approved. Please validate delivery and inventory dispatch.

a.style: background-color: #7c7bad; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; font-weight: bold; display: inline-block;

hr.style: border: none; border-top: 1px solid #eeeeee; margin-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px;

div.p: Automated Notification from Secondary Sales Odoo Backend.

record.field: Email notification sent when a Sale Order is confirmed

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #333333; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; background-color: #ffffff;
div.p: Your sale order SO001 has been confirmed.

hr.style: border: none; border-top: 1px solid #eeeeee; margin-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px;

div.p: Automated Notification from Secondary Sales Odoo Backend.

record.field: Email notification sent when a Sale Order is cancelled

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #333333; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; background-color: #ffffff;
div.p: Sale order SO001 has been cancelled.

hr.style: border: none; border-top: 1px solid #eeeeee; margin-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px;

div.p: Automated Notification from Secondary Sales Odoo Backend.
